'''√zh-s-r''' ('''zhasara''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:joyhop|joyhop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-s-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:joyhop|joyhop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √zh-s-r
|-
! Lemma
| zhasara
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhasarithi|zhasarithi]] || [[word:zhasariji|zhasariji]] || [[word:zhasarishi|zhasarishi]] || [[word:zhasari|zhasari]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhasaruthuth|zhasaruthuth]] || [[word:zhasarujuj|zhasarujuj]] || [[word:zhasarushush|zhasarushush]] || [[word:zhasar|zhasar]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhasaruthu|zhasaruthu]] || [[word:zhasaruju|zhasaruju]] || [[word:zhasarushu|zhasarushu]] || [[word:zhasaru|zhasaru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhasarufuth|zhasarufuth]] || [[word:zhasarufuj|zhasarufuj]] || [[word:zhasarufush|zhasarufush]] || [[word:zhasaruf|zhasaruf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhasarethe|zhasarethe]] || [[word:zhasareje|zhasareje]] || [[word:zhasareshe|zhasareshe]] || [[word:zhasare|zhasare]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhasarothoth|zhasarothoth]] || [[word:zhasarojoj|zhasarojoj]] || [[word:zhasaroshosh|zhasaroshosh]] || [[word:zhasar|zhasar]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhasarotho|zhasarotho]] || [[word:zhasarojo|zhasarojo]] || [[word:zhasarosho|zhasarosho]] || [[word:zhasaro|zhasaro]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhasarofoth|zhasarofoth]] || [[word:zhasarofoj|zhasarofoj]] || [[word:zhasarofosh|zhasarofosh]] || [[word:zhasarof|zhasarof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhasarïf|zhasarïf]] || [[word:zhasarïf|zhasarïf]] || [[word:zhasarïf|zhasarïf]] || [[word:zhasarïf|zhasarïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhasarïfïf|zhasarïfïf]] || [[word:zhasarïfïf|zhasarïfïf]] || [[word:zhasarïfïf|zhasarïfïf]] || [[word:zhasarïfïf|zhasarïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhasarïf|zhasarïf]] || [[word:zhasarïf|zhasarïf]] || [[word:zhasarïf|zhasarïf]] || [[word:zhasarïf|zhasarïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhasarïf|zhasarïf]] || [[word:zhasarïf|zhasarïf]] || [[word:zhasarïf|zhasarïf]] || [[word:zhasarïf|zhasarïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhasaræthæ|zhasaræthæ]] || [[word:zhasaræjæ|zhasaræjæ]] || [[word:zhasaræshæ|zhasaræshæ]] || [[word:zhasaræ|zhasaræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhasarathath|zhasarathath]] || [[word:zhasarajaj|zhasarajaj]] || [[word:zhasarashash|zhasarashash]] || [[word:zhasar|zhasar]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhasaratha|zhasaratha]] || [[word:zhasaraja|zhasaraja]] || [[word:zhasarasha|zhasarasha]] || [[word:zhasara|zhasara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhasarafath|zhasarafath]] || [[word:zhasarafaj|zhasarafaj]] || [[word:zhasarafash|zhasarafash]] || [[word:zhasaraf|zhasaraf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zhasarasha|zhasarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozhasarasha|gozhasarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizhasarasha|gokizhasarasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zhasarnüsha|zhasarnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozhasarnknüsha|gozhasarnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizhasarnüsha|gokizhasarnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zhasarshësha|zhasarshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhasarnkshësha|gozhasarnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizhasarshësha|gokizhasarshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhasarrosha|zhasarrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhasarnkrosha|gozhasarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhasarrosha|gokizhasarrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhasarmusha|zhasarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhasarnkmusha|gozhasarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhasarmusha|gokizhasarmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zhasarsherasha|zhasarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozhasarnksherasha|gozhasarnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizhasarsherasha|gokizhasarsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zhasarngasha|zhasarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozhasarnkngasha|gozhasarnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizhasarngasha|gokizhasarngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhasaryasha|zhasaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozhasarnkyasha|gozhasarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizhasaryasha|gokizhasaryasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zhasaryamasha|zhasaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozhasarnkyamasha|gozhasarnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizhasaryamasha|gokizhasaryamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhasarnüshësha|zhasarnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhasarnknüshësha|gozhasarnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhasarnüshësha|gokizhasarnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhasarnürosha|zhasarnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhasarnknürosha|gozhasarnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhasarnürosha|gokizhasarnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhasarnümusha|zhasarnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhasarnknümusha|gozhasarnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhasarnümusha|gokizhasarnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhasarshënüsha|zhasarshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhasarnkshënüsha|gozhasarnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhasarshënüsha|gokizhasarshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhasarshërosha|zhasarshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhasarnkshërosha|gozhasarnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhasarshërosha|gokizhasarshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhasarshëmusha|zhasarshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhasarnkshëmusha|gozhasarnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhasarshëmusha|gokizhasarshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhasarronüsha|zhasarronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhasarnkronüsha|gozhasarnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhasarronüsha|gokizhasarronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhasarroshësha|zhasarroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhasarnkroshësha|gozhasarnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhasarroshësha|gokizhasarroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zhasarromusha|zhasarromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhasarnkromusha|gozhasarnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizhasarromusha|gokizhasarromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zhasarmunüsha|zhasarmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozhasarnkmunüsha|gozhasarnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizhasarmunüsha|gokizhasarmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zhasarmushësha|zhasarmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozhasarnkmushësha|gozhasarnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizhasarmushësha|gokizhasarmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhasarmurosha|zhasarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhasarnkmurosha|gozhasarnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizhasarmurosha|gokizhasarmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zhasar|zhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zhæsær|zhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozhasar|hozhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozhæsær|hozhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhasar|hohozhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozhæsær|hohozhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nüzhasar|nüzhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nüzhæsær|nüzhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüzhasar|nünüzhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nünüzhæsær|nünüzhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïzhasar|nïzhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïzhæsær|nïzhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïzhasar|nïnïzhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïzhæsær|nïnïzhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzhasar|luzhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzhæsær|luzhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhasar|luluzhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzhæsær|luluzhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizhasar|lizhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizhæsær|lizhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhasar|lilizhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizhæsær|lilizhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozhasar|kozhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozhæsær|kozhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhasar|kokozhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozhæsær|kokozhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezhasar|kezhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezhæsær|kezhæsær]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhasar|kekezhasar]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezhæsær|kekezhæsær]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
